title: oldenlandia corymbosa var. uniflora
intro: Oldenlandia corymbosa var. uniflora is a variety of flowering plant in the family Rubiaceae, commonly known as the 'one-flower oldenlandia'. This plant is valued for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antibacterial, and antiviral activities. The health benefits associated with Oldenlandia corymbosa var. uniflora include its potential to reduce fever, alleviate respiratory issues, and aid in the treatment of various infections. In traditional herbal medicine, Oldenlandia corymbosa var. uniflora is often prepared as a decoction, tea, or infused in water, and is also used in the form of powder or extract to harness its medicinal properties.
